title: Long Zhong Ren
titleNative: 笼中人
synopsis: Suddenly, Fei Xingkong and Si Rui discovered that they were confined to a comic book cage. Their desire was to return to the real world. But in the world of stories that never stops changing, they were forced to escape the total control of the "author"...

title: Zhui Xu 2nd Season
titleNative: 赘婿 第二季
synopsis: In the eighth year of Jinghan, the neighboring countries in the north of the Wu Dynasty were at war, and the south was temporarily at peace. When Ning Yi and Su Tan'er came to Lin'an City to do business, they suddenly encountered a dragon turning over. The bandit Thirteenth Army took advantage of the situation to capture Lin'an, causing the couple to be separated. The captured Ning Yi met the Thirteenth Army leaders Liu Xigua, Chen Fan and others one after another. They cherished each other and were both enemies and friends. In the midst of the disputes between the family and the country, the great Confucianists defended the way, heroes rose up, and the world changed...

title: Lu Di Jian Xian
titleNative: 陆地键仙
synopsis: The top of the immortals, proud of the world, as long as my ancestor An is there, there is the sky. There are three million sword immortals in the world, and they must bow their heads when they meet me. As a sword immortal, I should suppress all enemies in the world. Who claims to be invincible, who claims to be undefeated? (Source: iQIYI)

title: Genki Genki Nontan
titleNative: げんきげんきノンタン
synopsis: This 3D animated series for young children is based on the adventures of perky white kitten Non-tan. With his friends, fun-loving Tanuki, strong Bear, and the pink Rabbit triplets and his rival, Pig, he teaches children positive lessons about the beauty and wonder of life. (Source: The Anime Encyclopedia)

title: Kobo-chan Special: Yakusoku no Magic Day
titleRomaji: Kobo-chan Special: Yakusoku no Magic Day
titleNative: コボちゃんスペシャル 約束のマジックディ
synopsis: Kobo-chan televised specials that aired after the TV anime's serialization. The special received some interrupted broadcasts in some parts of Japan due to an earthquake near the Miyagi Prefecture.

title: Murder Mystery of the Dead
titleNative: マーダーミステリー・オブ・ザ・デッド
synopsis: The world has collapsed due to a zombie pandemic. The protagonist, Mikoto Amano, wakes up in an unfamiliar place with no memory and is taken in by six girls. However, a shocking incident occurs: a man who was taken in alongside Mikoto is murdered, and the culprit is one of them. Set in the Tokyu Kabukicho Tower, mysteries and secrets unfold one after another within the now-sealed building. Will the girls, who have begun to form a bond, be able to uncover the truth behind the incident? (animated Times, translated)
